eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Midway Islands, US Pacific Islands; at 01:52 AM ON MAY 5, 2026 Effective until 02:52 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The IPAWS Program Management Office is performing a TEST of the Emergency Alert System. No action is required. This is only TEST
